CustomField.description: This is checked if the PD Required By Matches the Employee's Assigned to Unit - Client.
CustomField.formula:
AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Assigned_to_Unit_Client__c)), OR( LOWER(TRIM(Required_By__c)) = "wild desert",
OR( AND( LOWER(TRIM(Assigned_to_Unit_Client__c)) = "santos sa", LOWER(TRIM(Required_By__c)) = "santos glng (qld)" ), AND( LOWER(TRIM(Assigned_to_Unit_Client__c)) = "santos glng (qld)", LOWER(TRIM(Required_By__c)) = "santos sa" ) ),
LOWER(TRIM(Assigned_to_Unit_Client__c)) = LOWER(TRIM(Required_By__c)) ) )
CustomField.label: Required By & Client Match
